profile.name: Lorenzo Segalini
profile.headline: Software Engineer
profile.summary: Software Engineer with experience building full-stack web products. I work on production applications with JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js and React/Next.js, from database to cloud deployment. I enjoy solving complex problems with attention to detail and picking up new technologies quickly.
